name: NADAR
description: Commercial drone services for real estate, construction, surveying, mapping, roof and building inspections with infrared and 3D measurements, bridge and utility inspections.

sentiment.label: positive

highlights.text: My experience with Nadar was seamless. They were out on site the day after we told them of the rush
Nadar not only captures great aerial images, but are extremely wonderful to work with
Nadar provides 5-star service on every project
Jeff and his team are top class professionals with services that make designs much more accurate

sentiment.summary: NADAR consistently receives exceptional praise for rapid responsiveness to deadline pressure, professional expertise, high-quality aerial imaging, excellent communication, and reliable 5-star service that clients trust for long-term partnerships.

name: RayAccess, Inc.
description: Aerial drone inspection services for safety and compliance, including roof, industrial, bridge, smokestack inspections using FAA-certified pilots; also rope access, visual inspections.

sentiment.label: positive
sentiment.summary: Aerial drone inspection services for safety and compliance, including roof, industrial, bridge, smokestack inspections using FAA-certified pilots; also rope access, visual inspections.

name: Volatus Unmanned Services
description: High-quality drone-based images, video, data for analysis, surveying, mapping serving entire state of California across various industries.
